Description: Coalesced Mana tier line — three custom WCIDs (800000-800002) shared with EmpyreanAlteration awakening + BetterLootControl drops. Blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays 1-3. Turn in to Collector Vaetha (810003) for XP and bank credit. Drops are handled exclusively by BetterLootControl (GlobalRareDrops); Windblown trophy drops are disabled here (DropChance=0).
